data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the vacation rental turnover process.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of the vacation rental turnover process, which includes the cleaner completing a checklist, taking photos of any damage, and the host signing off on the damage report. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms any of these actions have been completed or validated in the prior steps. The linked use case outlines the necessary steps, but without concrete evidence of their execution, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of cleaner completing the turnover checklist, taking photos of damage, or host acknowledgment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for turnover checklist completion and damage acknowledgment
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the completion of the turnover checklist and the acknowledgment of any damage by the host.
